summary: Natural Aptitude must be purchased separately for Sub

mechanics.name_guess: Natural Aptitude must be purchased separately for Sub
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 085 > locations > Natural Aptitude must be purchased separately for Sub
mechanics.excerpt: Natural Aptitude must be purchased separately for Sub skills with the exception of Bureaucracy; Protocol and Streetwise In these cases_ the aptitude is considered to cover all regional subskills Of course separate subskills for each region must be acquired as usual, but the aptitude applies to them_ For example character with Natural Aptitude / Streetwise and the skills Streetwise / Luthien and Streetwise /Capellan Confederation would be considered have Natural Aptitude with both subskills_ NIGHT BLINDNESS Value: The character has very poor night vision_ such that all tar get number modifiers for darkness are doubled, NIGHT VISION Cost: character with this trait has better-than average night vision, although he is not actually able to see in complete dark- ness.
